title: ilex × shepherdii
intro: Ilex × shepherdii, also known as Shepherd's Holly, is a holly tree hybrid native to eastern North America, resulting from the cross between Ilex glabra and Ilex opaca. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Ilex × shepherdii include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and act as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Ilex × shepherdii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a variety of medicinal products, including capsules and topical creams.
